div.head: The Consul General at Barcelona (Perkins) to the Secretary of State
div.p: My June 1, 11 a.m.Ante, p. 314. and Wells’ June 1, 6 p.m.Not printed; in it the Vice Consul at Valencia reported a request for assistance from an American survivor of the City of Barcelona disaster (852.2221 Sauermilch, Alexander/1). In view of the disaster to the steamship City of Barcelona does the Department desire me to take any initiative in inquiring concerning the Americans reported to be in hospital at Malgrat or the fate of any who may have been lost? The Department appreciates that those concerned are presumably all volunteers and that the steamship was not engaged in any regular passenger service.
